source_jobs.title: Telesales Agent
source_jobs.description:
💸 Base salary + commission = realistic OTE of £40k in your first year. Commission is earned through a mixture of sales and behavioural targets.

📍 Hybrid working - Lincoln City Centre office (3 days per week) and remote (2 days per week)

We are looking for experienced telesales agents to sell tenants insurance through cool/warm lead, you will have experience in outbound phone calls that have a purpose, this could be selling/upselling/cross selling or appointment setting or similar.

Targets are not purely based on sales but also activity and behaviours, e.g. meeting, and ideally exceeding, QA pass rates. You will be rewarded with a newly structured commission scheme based on these combined targets.

Our mission:

 - Two in five people in the UK rent their homes. Goodlord's mission? To be the gold standard platform for renting 🌎

 - We started Goodlord because we wanted to make renting simple and transparent for everyone involved: the agent, the landlord, and the tenant. We knew Generation Rent would lead to more tenants, with higher digital expectations and we were confident we could provide a solution 🏠

 - Like all scale-ups it’s been a bit of a rollercoaster journey, but we’re now stronger than ever, with around 3,000 letting agents using the platform, exciting and varied products and 350+ Goodlordians across the group supporting the mission! 💚

What we need from you:

 - Experience with high volume (90+ calls per day) outbound sales calls

 - Experience in B2C (or B2B) closing within sales calls is highly desirable

 - Possess great organisational skills and time management to get the most out of each day - you’ll be switching between various IT systems so it’s important you are organised

 - You must have a positive attitude and a resilient attitude - maintaining this throughout the whole day.


WHY YOU'LL LOVE BEING A GOODLORDIAN

Aside from the role, the people, our culture and our mission, we have some other things that make Goodlord a pretty awesome place to be. Here’s a few favourites amongst Goodlordians (check out our careers page for more info).

 - Grow with Goodlord: your development is important to us, that’s why we are Great Place to Work - certified https://www.greatplacetowork.co.uk/certified-company/1558877. Have a goal in mind? Share it with us so we can use some of our annual development fund to support it. We guarantee you’ll learn loads and develop both personally and professionally!

 - Your well-being matters: bi-weekly coaching with Sanctus to provide Goodlordians with a safe place to talk and support your mental health

 - 25 days holiday (plus UK Bank holidays) plus 1 day per full holiday year up to 32 days: We believe regular breaks are essential for well-being and we encourage (some may say expect!) all Goodlordians to take full advantage of their annual leave entitlement.

 - Supporting your family: we offer Goodlordians of all genders a generous 3 months of fully-paid time off to look after their new arrivals

 - Our team: we’re an energetic, sociable, and talented bunch who are super passionate about what we do and determined to make a difference. We’re all in it together, we learn from each other, we’re genuine and we don’t have time for politics




WHAT’S NEXT?

If you’re ready to help us on our mission to be the gold standard platform for renting, then click apply (2-3 minutes)!

A full job spec is available on request.


Goodlord wants applicants from all backgrounds and walks of life. We are an equal opportunity employer committed to creating an inclusive environment where people can do their best work. If there is anything you need to participate fully in the interview process, we’d love to hear about that - please just include it in your application. Come and join us!


** Please note, as we are regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority, all Goodlordians are required to pass a thorough referencing check via Experian before joining the team. We will only ask for references at the po

source_jobs.title: Junior Telesales Agent
source_jobs.description:
💸 Base salary + commission = realistic OTE of £40k in your first year. Commission is earned through a mixture of sales and behavioural targets.

📍 Hybrid working - Lincoln City Centre office (3 days per week) and remote (2 days per week)

We are looking for junior telesales agents who want to kick start their career in sales. The role will be selling tenants insurance to tenants who have used our platform in volume - the perfect way to start your sales career.

You might not have any sales experience but that isn't a problem! We have a fantastic L+D team who will teach you all things sales, insurance and Goodlord in your on-boarding period.

Targets are not purely based on sales but also activity and behaviours, e.g. meeting, and ideally exceeding, QA pass rates. You will be rewarded with a newly structured commission scheme based on these combined targets.

 - You want a career in sales! 

 - You have some transferable skills - perhaps you have spent your summer working in a bar, or hotel or restaurant? Perhaps you had a gap year skiing in the alps.

source_jobs.title: Customer Support Executive - Sheffield (Hybrid)
source_jobs.description:
Location - This role is based in our Sheffield office 3 days per week with 2 days working from home.
Please note: The first FIVE weeks will be full time in the office for training



We’re open to two different profiles for this role:

Profile 1:

 - Someone with previous contact centre experience

Profile 2:

 - A recent college leaver or graduate with hospitality experience looking to take the next step in their career

Full training is provided so if you’re looking for a fresh start or a move into a new industry, this could be a great fit for you.


Working hours - 37.5 hours per week (Monday-Friday, 9am-5.30pm with very occasional Saturday working)



Salary - £26,900 (Year 1 OTE of £27,700) 



Start Date - must be able to start on Tuesday 21st July 2026


As part of our recruitment process, we use an AI assistant called Lily to carry out an initial phone call. It takes just a few minutes and allows us to progress suitable candidates faster, including outside normal working hours.



Our mission:

 - Two in five people in the UK rent their homes. Goodlord's mission? To be the gold standard platform for renting

 - We started Goodlord because we wanted to make renting simple and transparent for everyone involved: the agent, the landlord, and the tenant. We knew Generation Rent would lead to more tenants, with higher digital expectations and we were confident we could provide a solution

 - Like all scale-ups it’s been a bit of a rollercoaster journey, but we’re now stronger than ever, with around 3,000 letting agents using the platform, exciting and varied products and 350 Goodlordians supporting the mission!



The Opportunity:

 - Pro actively working to progress referencing applications ensuring reports are generated for our customers in line with our KPI measurements

 - Helping tenants to get their dream home through meeting and exceeding targets.

 - Professionally supporting our customers with high levels of accuracy (this is super important) with great care and diligence via phone, live chat and email.

What we need from you:

 - Previous experience working in a highly targeted and fast-moving contact centre is highly desirable - we will prioritise applications with this experience, but it isn't essential

 - Customer centric mindset allowing you to quickly identify and understand the needs of our different customers

 - Have great attention to detail and can easily identify inconsistencies

It would also be great if:  

 - You have previous experience in conducting credit or ID checks or working within the lettings industry

 - you’re super organised and have proven your ability to prioritise effectively


WHY YOU'LL LOVE BEING A GOODLORDIAN

Aside from the role, the people, our culture and our mission, we have some other things that make Goodlord a pretty awesome place to be. Here’s a few favourites amongst Goodlordians (check out our careers page for more info).

source_jobs.title: Senior Business Systems Analyst
source_jobs.description:
📍 Location: London (E1)

🖥 Hybrid working as standard: 2 days a week in the office, the other 3 days remote (or office if you prefer)

As part of our commitment to embedding AI across the business, we'd encourage you to share any experience using AI, automation or emerging technologies in your CV or application. We are looking for people who are curious, embrace new technology and can identify opportunities to create business value through AI.



Our mission:

 - Two in five people in the UK rent their homes. Our mission? To be the gold standard platform for renting

 - We started Goodlord because we wanted to make renting simple and transparent for everyone involved: the agent, the landlord, and the tenant. We knew Generation Rent would lead to more tenants, with higher digital expectations and we were confident we could provide a solution

 - Like all scale-ups it’s been a bit of a rollercoaster journey, but we’re now stronger than ever, with around 3,000 letting agents using the platform, exciting and varied products and 350+ Goodlordians across the group supporting the mission!



The Opportunity:

 - Own and optimise Salesforce and key business systems across Sales, Marketing, Support and Finance

 - Partner with stakeholders to improve operational processes and deliver scalable system solutions

 - Drive automation and AI-powered efficiencies using Salesforce’s latest AI capabilities to improve workflows and business performance

 - Work in a fast-paced scale-up environment where you can influence strategy, solve real business problems and make a visible impact



What we need from you:

 - Strong hands-on Salesforce Sales Cloud administration, configuration and automation experience

 - Experience identifying opportunities to use AI and automation to streamline processes and improve operational efficiency

 - Ability to gather requirements, map processes and translate business needs into scalable system solutions

 - Proactive, solutions-focused mindset with experience managing integrations, working cross-functionally and thriving in a changing environment


WHY YOU'LL LOVE BEING A GOODLORDIAN

 - Supporting your family: we offer Goodlordians of all genders a generous 3 months of fully-paid time off to look after their new arrivals

source_jobs.title: SDR Lead
source_jobs.description:
📍 London (E1) or Sheffield City Centre or Lincoln City Centre | Hybrid - 3 days in the office, 2 days from home

We'll build the full SDR team around the successful hire, so the location is genuinely flexible between our three office hubs.



The opportunity

Goodlord's mission is to become the gold standard platform for renting and we're looking for an SDR Lead to build our Sales Development function from the ground up.

Reporting directly to the Head of Sales, this is a true 'blank canvas' role with no pre-existing playbook. You will architect the strategy, source the tools, and hire a brand-new early careers team who will be the future of commercial talent at Goodlord!


 - Build the SDR function from the ground up, creating the strategy, playbook, processes and team rather than inheriting someone else's.

 - Experiment with tooling, automation and AI to help the team work smarter, generate better conversations and create more pipeline.

 - Balance both Enterprise and Mid-Market outbound motions, helping us figure out what great looks like across different customer segments.

 - Play a key role in shaping one of Goodlord's most important growth functions, with the freedom to test ideas, move quickly and make a genuine impact.




What we need from you:

The most important part of this role is coaching, mentorship and leadership. We need a leader who genuinely loves nurturing raw talent e.g. graduates, school & college and transforming them into high-performing commercial professionals.

 - Essential Early-Careers Coaching: A proven track record of managing, mentoring, and developing inexperienced hires, building their confidence and core commercial skills.

 - B2B SaaS SDR Experience: Significant experience within a B2B SaaS sales development environment, including time spent as a Team Lead, Senior SDR, or Player-Coach.

 - A Builder Mindset: Comfortable with ambiguity and highly motivated to create order, strategies, and playbooks where none exist.

 - Tech-Savvy Outlook: Deep familiarity with tools like Salesforce/HubSpot and Outreach/Salesloft, paired with a genuine enthusiasm for AI sales automation

Note: Whilst you won't carry an individual quota, this isn't a role for someone who wants to manage from the sidelines. We need a leader who is happy to demonstrate what good looks like and help a brand-new team develop into high-performing SDRs.



It would also be great if you have:

 - Prior experience navigating the fast-paced environment of a rapidly evolving scale-up.

 - An awareness or understanding of the PropTech sector.


WHY YOU'LL LOVE BEING A GOODLORDIAN

Aside from the role, the people, our culture and our mission, we have some other things that make Goodlord a pretty awesome place to be. Here’s a few favourites amongst Goodlordians (check out our careers page for more info).

 - Grow with Goodlord: your development is important to us, that’s why we are Great Place to Work - certified https://www.greatplacetowork.co.uk/certified-company/1558877. Have a goal in mind? Share it with us so we can use some of our annual development fund to support it. We guarantee you’ll learn loads and develop both personally and professionally!

 - Your well-being matters: bi-weekly coaching with Sanctus to provide Goodlordians with a safe place to talk and support your mental health

 - 25 days holiday (plus UK Bank holidays) plus 1 day per full holiday year up to 32 days: We believe regular breaks are essential for well-being and we encourage (some may say expect!) all Goodlordians to take full advantage of their annual leave entitlement.

 - Supporting your family: we offer Goodlordians of all genders a generous 3 months of fully-paid time off to look after their new arrivals

 - Our team: we’re an energetic, sociable, and talented bunch who are super passionate about what we do and determined to make a difference. We’re all in it together, we learn from each other, we’re genuine and we don’t have time for politics

source_jobs.title: Service Improvement Executive
source_jobs.description:
📍Location - this role is based in our Sheffield office 2 days per week with the remaining 3 days working remotely

We are looking for a highly analytical and pragmatic Service Improvement Executive to drive continuous improvement initiatives across our support function. In this role, you will act as a detective and an architect-digging into data to find inefficiencies and design and implement scalable, tech-forward solutions to elevate our customer experience.

We know that having the right mindset is the most important asset, which is why we will provide the training, guidance, and mentorship you need to master our methodologies and succeed in this role. You will own the end-to-end improvement cycle, utilising a core philosophy of Measure, Identify, Improve, and Automate. From spotting gaps in our data to mapping resource expenditure and implementing AI-driven solutions, you will be the driving force behind our operational excellence.

As part of our recruitment process, we use an AI assistant called Lily to carry out an initial phone call. It takes just a few minutes and allows us to progress suitable candidates faster, including outside normal working hours.

Our mission:

 - Two in five people in the UK rent their homes. Goodlord's mission? To be the gold standard platform for renting 🌎

 - We started Goodlord because we wanted to make renting simple and transparent for everyone involved: the agent, the landlord, and the tenant. We knew Generation Rent would lead to more tenants, with higher digital expectations and we were confident we could provide a solution 🏠

 - Like all scale-ups it’s been a bit of a rollercoaster journey, but we’re now stronger than ever, with around 3,000 letting agents using the platform, exciting and varied products and 350+ Goodlordians across the group supporting the mission! 💚

What we need from you:

 - Experience working with and analysing large volumes of data.

 - Experience presenting clear, data-driven insights to a range of stakeholders.

 - A natural drive for problem-solving: You see a problem, you want to fix it using a structured yet creative approach.

 - An analytical mind: You are able to see patterns in data and use those insights to drive your decisions

 - A deep sense of ownership: You see things through from start to finish, proactively learning whatever is necessary to get the job done and accomplish your goal

 - Curiosity & Creativity: You actively want to, and get energised by, learning new things. You love taking a novel approach to resolving problems

 - Strong communication and interpersonal skills: You are able to communicate complex points across in a way that is easy for anyone to understand

 - Excellent teamwork abilities: You collaborate effortlessly with others to get things done

 - Adaptability, resilience and flexibility: You navigate shifting priorities with ease and keep pushing forward when things change.

It would also be great if you have:

 - Previous experience making and acting on data-driven decisions.

 - Previous experience working in Customer Support / Customer-facing roles. Ideally in managing relationships or phone-based customer service.

 - Prior hands hands-on experience with project management, process improvement methodologies, work segmentation, or data analysis

 - A degree (or equivalent) in a STEM based subject


WHY YOU'LL LOVE BEING A GOODLORDIAN

Aside from the role, the people, our culture and our mission, we have some other things that make Goodlord a pretty awesome place to be. Here’s a few favourites amongst Goodlordians (check out our careers page for more info).

 - Grow with Goodlord: your development is important to us, that’s why we are Great Place to Work - certified https://www.greatplacetowork.co.uk/certified-company/1558877. Have a goal in mind? Share it with us so we can use some of our annual development fund to support it. We guarantee you’ll learn loads and develop both personally and professionally!

 - Your well-b

source_jobs.title: RevOps Analyst
source_jobs.description:
📍 London Hybrid - 3 days per week in our London office (E1), 2 days remote/WFH (or the office if you prefer!)

Who we are

At Goodlord, our mission is to be the gold-standard platform for renting.

Used by more than 3,500 letting agents across the UK, we're building products that remove friction from every stage of the rental journey.

Behind that sits a commercial organisation powered by data, systems and smart decision-making - and that's where Revenue Operations comes in.

We're now looking for our first dedicated RevOps Analyst to help us build the reporting, systems and processes that allow our commercial teams to spend less time chasing information and more time delivering results.

What is the role?

This is a hands-on Revenue Operations role reporting to our Revenue Operations Lead.

You'll help turn commercial strategy into day-to-day reality by building dashboards, improving data quality, configuring Salesforce and uncovering the insights that help our Sales, Marketing and Customer Success teams make better decisions.

You'll have plenty of ownership, but you'll also have someone experienced to learn from as the function continues to grow.

Your day-to-day will involve:

 - Building and maintaining the dashboards our commercial teams rely on every day.

 - Configuring and improving Salesforce, helping keep our CRM clean, reliable and fit for purpose.

 - Analysing pipeline, renewals, retention and commercial performance to identify trends, opportunities and risks.

 - Improving data quality across Salesforce, HubSpot and Planhat so we can trust the numbers we're working with.

 - Working across Sales, Marketing, Customer Success and Finance to improve processes throughout the customer lifecycle.

 - Testing new automations and AI-powered workflows that make our commercial teams more effective.

This is a genuinely hands-on role. You'll be building dashboards, fixing processes, digging into data and solving problems yourself.

If you're looking for a strategic leadership position where you're setting company-wide commercial direction, this isn't the right fit.

If you enjoy getting stuck into the detail whilst having real influence on how a business operates, you'll likely love it!

You should apply if:

 - You've built a solid foundation in RevOps, Sales Ops, Business Operations or commercial analytics within a SaaS business and are ready for your next challenge.

 - You're confident using Salesforce (reporting, dashboards and basic configuration) and enjoy making systems work better.

 - You enjoy working with SaaS commercial metrics like NRR, GRR and churn, using data to help commercial teams make smarter decisions.

 - You're naturally curious, enjoy solving problems and always look for ways to improve how things work.

 - Experience with SQL, BI tools, Planhat or AI-powered automation would be a bonus, but isn't essential.

Most importantly, we're looking for someone who enjoys building, improving and learning. This is an opportunity to join Revenue Operations at an exciting stage, work closely with an experienced Revenue Operations Lead, and play a genuine role in shaping how our commercial teams operate as Goodlord continues to grow.


WHY YOU'LL LOVE BEING A GOODLORDIAN

Aside from the role, the people, our culture and our mission, we have some other things that make Goodlord a pretty awesome place to be. Here’s a few favourites amongst Goodlordians (check out our careers page for more info).

Share it with us so we can use some of our annual development fund to support it. We guarantee you’ll learn loads and develop both personally and professionally!

 - 25 days holiday (plus UK

source_jobs.title: Insurance Claims Facilitator
source_jobs.description:
📍 Based in our Lincoln City Centre office 3 days per week with the remaining 2 days working remotely

Our mission:

 - Two in five people in the UK rent their homes. Our mission? To be the gold standard platform for renting

 - We started Goodlord because we wanted to make renting simple and transparent for everyone involved: the agent, the landlord, and the tenant. We knew Generation Rent would lead to more tenants, with higher digital expectations and we were confident we could provide a solution 🏠

 - Like all scale-ups it’s been a bit of a rollercoaster journey, but we’re now stronger than ever, with around 3,000 letting agents using the platform, exciting and varied products and 320 Goodlordians across the group supporting the mission! 💚



The Opportunity:

 - Responsible for communicating a resolution between landlords, guarantors, letting agents and tenants

 - Supporting all insurance aspects of the claims process from submission to conclusion of the claim

 - Overseeing repayment arrangements in the result of a resolution.

 - Responding to inbound queries from internal and external stakeholders



What we need from you:

 - Experience working in a process driven, administrative environment delivering outstanding customer service

 - Excellent communication skills, and can establish rapport and trust with people quickly and effectively over the phone and in writing

 - Outstanding organisational skills with the ability to prioritise efficiently to manage your own caseload and service levels

 - A positive, get stuff done attitude, even under pressure, and you're comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

 - Strong IT literacy and are comfortable using various software packages, ideally Salesforce and Microsoft packages



It would be great (but not essential!) if:

 - You have previously worked in the lettings industry or within an insurance environment.


WHY YOU'LL LOVE BEING A GOODLORDIAN

Aside from the role, the people, our culture and our mission, we have some other things that make Goodlord a pretty awesome place to be. Here’s a few favourites amongst Goodlordians (check out our careers page for more info).

 - Grow with Goodlord: your development is important to us, that’s why we are Great Place to Work - certified https://www.greatplacetowork.co.uk/certified-company/1558877. Have a goal in mind? Share it with us so we can use some of our annual development fund to support it. We guarantee you’ll learn loads and develop both personally and professionally!

 - Your well-being matters: bi-weekly coaching with Sanctus to provide Goodlordians with a safe place to talk and support your mental health

 - 25 days holiday (plus UK Bank holidays) plus 1 day per full holiday year up to 32 days: We believe regular breaks are essential for well-being and we encourage (some may say expect!) all Goodlordians to take full advantage of their annual leave entitlement.

 - Supporting your family: we offer Goodlordians of all genders a generous 3 months of fully-paid time off to look after their new arrivals

 - Our team: we’re an energetic, sociable, and talented bunch who are super passionate about what we do and determined to make a difference. We’re all in it together, we learn from each other, we’re genuine and we don’t have time for politics




WHAT’S NEXT?

If you’re ready to help us on our mission to be the gold standard platform for renting, then click apply (2-3 minutes)!

A full job spec is available on request.


Goodlord wants applicants from all backgrounds and walks of life. We are an equal opportunity employer committed to creating an inclusive environment where people can do their best work. If there is anything you need to participate fully in the interview process, we’d love to hear about that - please just include it in your application. Come and join us!


** Please note, as we are regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority, all Goodlordians are required to pass a thorough referencing check via Exp

source_jobs.title: Talent Pool
source_jobs.description:
JOIN OUR TALENT POOL! 🤝

Don't see the perfect role for you today? No worries! The ideal opportunity could be just around the corner.

If you're interested in a career with us, but haven't found the right fit yet, we'd love for you to join our Talent Pool!

This way, when a role that matches your skills and interests opens up, our Talent Team can contact you directly! 🚀

WHAT IS A TALENT POOL & WHAT HAPPENS WHEN I APPLY? 🤔

Our Talent Pool is our way of connecting with great people who want to join our team! Even if we don't have immediate openings, we still want to know you're out there! 💖

Whenever new roles become available, we'll review our Talent Pool and reach out if there's a good match! But, we also encourage you to keep an eye on our careers page https://www.goodlord.co/careers 👀 we wouldn't want you to miss out on your dream job while we're reviewing applications!

When you join the Talent Pool, please tell us a little about the types of roles you're interested in and anything else we should know about your skills, experience, and aspirations! ✨



ABOUT US

Our mission:

 - Two in five people in the UK rent their homes. Our mission? To provide them with the best renting experience in the world 🌎

 - We started Goodlord because we wanted to make renting simple and transparent for everyone involved: the agent, the landlord, and the tenant. We knew Generation Rent would lead to more tenants, with higher digital expectations and we were confident we could provide a solution 🏠

 - Like all scale-ups it’s been a bit of a rollercoaster journey, but we’re now stronger than ever, with around 3,000 letting agents using the platform, exciting and varied products and 350+ Goodlordians across the group supporting the mission! 💚



Our purpose - building the best rental experience in the world - is clear to everyone, and so too is the fact that people are central to achieving that mission; we have worked hard to make Goodlord great so we’re proud to have been ranked 10th in the UK's Best Workplaces™ 2022 - Large category.

Not only that but the following too:-

 - Great Place to Work https://www.greatplacetowork.co.uk/certified-company/1558877 certified - 2024

 - Great place to Work top 30 for Development 2024

 - Great place to work top 50 for Well being 2024

 - Verified by Flexa as a Flexified employer - 2023/2024

 - Deloitte Technology Fast 50  - 2023

 - Excellence in Wellbeing for our dedication to goodlordian’s wellbeing 2023/2024

 - 10th Great Place to Work in the UK large-sized businesses 2022

 - 23rd Wellbeing Great Place to Work in UK Large- sized businesses 2022

 - 18th best workplace for Women in UK large-sized businesses 2022

 - 13th best workplaces for Tech in UK large-sized businesses 2022

Our values https://www.goodlord.co/our-values guide our decisions, the way we work, our culture and the people we ask to join the team. We work hard, have fun and support each other. We’re not afraid to make mistakes (we’d never learn if we didn’t) and we’re always looking to challenge ourselves. Our style is collaboration based on honesty, friendship and respect. 

It’s an exciting time here at Goodlord. If you’re inspired by what we’re doing, are up for a challenge and share our values, we’d love to hear from you.

WHY YOU’LL LOVE BEING A GOODLORDIAN:

Aside from the role, the people, our culture and our mission, we have some other things that make Goodlord a pretty awesome place to be. Here’s a few favourites amongst Goodlordians (check out our careers page https://www.goodlord.co/careers-in-tech for more info).

 - 🚀 Grow with Goodlord: your development is important to us. Have a goal in mind? Share it with us and you can use your £1000 annual development fund to support it. We guarantee you’ll learn loads and develop both personally and professionally at Goodlord too!

 - 💕 Your well-being matters: bi-weekly coaching with Sanctus to provide Goodlordians with a safe place to talk and support your mental health

 - 🌴 2

source_jobs.title: Operations Manager (InsurTech)
source_jobs.description:
📍 Remote Working - You will be required to visit our Lincoln office 1-2 days per month (paid travel)



Our Mission:

 - Two in five people in the UK rent their homes. Our mission? To be the gold standard platform for renting

 - We started Goodlord because we wanted to make renting simple and transparent for everyone involved: the agent, the landlord, and the tenant. We knew Generation Rent would lead to more tenants, with higher digital expectations and we were confident we could provide a solution

 - Like all scale-ups it’s been a bit of a rollercoaster journey, but we’re now stronger than ever, with around 3,000 letting agents using the platform, exciting and varied products and 350+ Goodlordians across the group supporting the mission!

 

The Opportunity:

 - Identify operational inefficiencies and lead initiatives to improve, streamline and automate existing processes.

 - Produce and maintain reporting, dashboards and insights that support the Insurance sales teams in achieving their goals.

 - Partner closely with Finance, Data and commercial stakeholders to solve problems and deliver operational improvements to ensure efficiency, accuracy and scalability.

 - Manage month-end operational processes, ensuring timely and accurate completion of key activities.

 - Manage and develop an Operations Exec, providing coaching, support and performance feedback.



What we need from you:

 - Experience in an Operations, Business Operations, Revenue Operations, Sales Operations or analytical role within a SaaS, technology or scale-up environment..

 - A track record of identifying operational challenges and implementing process improvements.

 - Strong SQL skills with the ability to confidently interrogate data to answer business questions.

 - Strong Excel and/or Google Sheets skills with the ability to manipulate, analyse and present data effectively.



It would also be great if you have:

 - experience working within an InsurTech or insurance business.
